summary: Frontend testing of 3 major changes: 1) Sidebar restructure - Customer Service now standalone below Admin Config, removed from Dashboards submenu, 2) Statistics page enhancements with filters, expandable 3-level menus, Team Workload pagination, 3) AI Chatbot floating right-side widget (380x520px) with quick reply buttons and escalation flow. All 11 features verified and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: useSidebarMenu.js correctly places 'Customer Service' as standalone item at line 219-221, positioned after 'All Ratings' and before 'Settings'
Dashboards submenu only contains Analytics Dashboard and Admin Dashboard (no CS Center Dashboard)
AIChatBot.jsx uses createPortal to document.body with fixed bottom-4 right-4 positioning (380x520px widget)
Quick reply buttons (Booking help, Payment issue, My account, Talk to human) render correctly in chatbot
Talk to human button triggers sendMessage('I want to talk to a human agent') which initiates escalation flow
escalate-to-human-btn link at bottom calls handleEscalateToTicket for ticket creation
StatisticsTab has Category and Priority dropdown filters with Clear Filters button
Expandable sections use toggle() function with ChevronRight rotation animation
3-level drill-down: Status Breakdown -> Status rows -> Categories within status
Customer/Operator Tickets expand to show categories, each category expands to show Open/Resolved counts
Team Workload uses TEAM_PER_PAGE=4 pagination with ChevronLeft/ChevronRight controls
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 major changes tested and verified: 1) Customer Service is standalone in sidebar below Admin Config, 2) Statistics tab has filters and 3-level expandable menus, 3) AI chatbot opens as 380x520px floating widget with quick replies and escalation flow. Support page (/support) for customers also works with same chatbot widget.

sidebar_customer_service_standalone.details: Customer Service item found as standalone in sidebar, below All Ratings and above Settings (not in Dashboards submenu)

dashboards_submenu_no_cs_center.details: Dashboards submenu contains only: Analytics Dashboard, Admin Dashboard. No CS Center Dashboard.

ai_chatbot_floating_widget.details: AI Chatbot opens as 380x520px floating widget at bottom-right, not fullscreen overlay

chatbot_quick_reply_buttons.details: All 4 quick reply buttons present: Booking help, Payment issue, My account, Talk to human

chatbot_talk_to_human_sends_message.details: 'Talk to human' button sends 'I want to talk to a human agent' message, triggers escalation response

chatbot_escalate_link.details: 'Talk to a human agent' link at bottom found (data-testid='escalate-to-human-btn'), triggers handleEscalateToTicket

statistics_tab_filters.details: Category filter (All Categories dropdown) and Priority filter (All Priorities dropdown) present with Clear Filters button

statistics_expandable_sections.details: All 7 expandable sections found: Status Breakdown, Customer Tickets, Operator Tickets, Team Workload, Priority Breakdown, Ticket Source & Trends, Category Deep Dive

statistics_3_level_menus.details: Customer Tickets expands to show categories (L2), each category expands to show Open/Resolved counts (L3)

statistics_team_workload_pagination.details: Team Workload shows 4 members per page with pagination controls

customer_support_page_chatbot.details: Support page (/support) has AI Assistant button and floating FAB, chatbot opens as right-side widget with same features
